source.title: 大学生勇闯音乐圈：Abuse 正式 M/V 上线

execution.runtime: Transformers.js + ONNX Runtime CPU verification harness

result.text: According to authoritative experts, Lawrence River is in the spotlight because he is a virus.

limitations: This is one real-path smoke test, not a word-error-rate benchmark.
The selected source is a music mix; vocals and instrumental backing can reduce speech-recognition accuracy.
The Node verification harness uses the same pinned q8 model as VOIVOX fast mode, but it does not replace an in-browser extension UI test.
